name: Pijul
description: Pijul — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Version Control.

seo.title: Pijul Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score

review.verdict: Pijul is a CI/CD for Applications tool.
pros: Automates build, test, and deploy pipelines
cons: Compute minutes add up for large monorepos
review.not_for: Projects with infrequent or manual releases
